content.full_text:
FAIR POLITICAL PRACTICES COMMISSION
P.O. Box 807 • 428 J Street • Sacramento, CA 95812-0807
(916) 322-5660 • Fax (916) 322-0886

August 9, 2002

Steve L. Andriese, Executive Director
Mountain-View Emergency Medical Services Agency
1101 Standiford Avenue, Suite D1
Modesto, CA 95350

Re: Your Request for Advice
Our File No. W-02-210

Dear Mr. Andriese:

As indicated in our August 7, 2002 telephone conversation, this correspondence confirms the withdrawal of your August 5, 2002 request for written advice from the Fair Political Practices Commission. You have elected to resubmit your request at a future date pending further discussion with counsel and supervisors from each of the involved counties.

Should you have any additional questions regarding this matter, please contact me at (916) 322-5660.

Sincerely,

Luisa Menchaca
General Counsel

By: [signature]
Jill Stecher
Counsel, Legal Division

JS:jg
I:\AdviceLtrs\02-210
